---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused product or engineering improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

Who is affected and what workflow is currently insufficient?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the smallest useful change and its acceptance criteria.

## Security and integration impact

Identify data, authorization, AI, government-system, payment, identity, or messaging boundaries.

## Test evidence required

List the backend/frontend checks and demo evidence that should accompany the change.
